summary: Updated the homepage Program section in index.html to a concise full-day workshop template that mentions only invited talks, poster sessions, coffee breaks, and a lunch break.
work_completed: Replaced the existing Program agenda copy in index.html with invited-talks and poster-session template language.
Verified the Program section no longer mentions lightning talks, panel discussions, tutorials, named speakers, or other disallowed session types.

findings.message: The product spec at docs/product-specs/workshop-website.md still describes the older generic Program agenda and should be updated to match the homepage copy.

follow_up_recommendations: Update docs/product-specs/workshop-website.md so the documented current behavior matches the revised Program section.
